race.description: The Drumstick Derby Provincial Mdn Plate
race.comment: VONDEL (12) returned from a spell last start with an encouraging effort at Hawkesbury, racing up on the speed from the outset then holding on gamely for second at the end of 1400m. Strong effort off a long break in heavy going which suggests the step up to a mile will suit. Big chance to go one better. Ex-Hong Kong galloper CLASSIC TWO (2) has been close up at both runs since returning from 14 months on the sidelines. Kept fresh since tiring close to home over 1350m at this track five weeks ago. Being brought along quietly but should be ready to peak as he gets out to this more favourable trip. HELLFIGHTER (4) tackled the mile for the first time last start and did a decent job to battle on for second after being handy all the way. Just needs luck from a wide gate to be competitive again. SATONO JASMINE (10) was easily accounted for last start on a heavy track at Hawkesbury. Worth another chance on a better surface. SIRIUS MOSS (11) looks ready to step up to the mile third-up.
